title: Attakwas Extreme promises champion rides
description: GEORGE NEWS - George MTB rider Tristan...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - George MTB rider Tristan Nortje is set to challenge defending champion Alan Hatherly in the Momentum Medical Scheme Attakwas Extreme, presented by Biogen, this Saturday, 17 January.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - George MTB rider Tristan Nortje is set to challenge defending champion Alan Hatherly in the Momentum Medical Scheme Attakwas Extreme, presented by Biogen, this Saturday, 17 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nortje, the reigning Tankwa Trek and Cape Pioneer champion, was Hatherly's nearest rival in 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hatherly also faces a stern test presented by riders from the Toyota Specialised Imbuko, Honeycomb 226ers, Insect Science, Singer KTM and Tshenolo Pro Cycling teams.","html":"Hatherly also faces a stern test presented by riders from the Toyota Specialised Imbuko, Honeycomb 226ers, Insect Science, Singer KTM and Tshenolo Pro Cycling teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The women's double defending cham-pion, Samantha Sanders, who excels in hot weather, will face off against the SA Gravel Champion, Hayley Preen, five-time winner Yolande de Villiers, and 2023 winner Sarah Hill.","html":"The women's double defending cham-pion, Samantha Sanders, who excels in hot weather, will face off against the SA Gravel Champion, Hayley Preen, five-time winner Yolande de Villiers, and 2023 winner Sarah Hill."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Dubbed the Hell of the South, the Attakwas challenges riders to an infa-mously tough 120km course from the Chandelier Game Lodge near Oudtshoorn to the Pine Creek Resort in Great Brak River."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Boasting UCI Class 1 status, it attracts some of the world's best mountain bikers.","html":"Boasting UCI Class 1 status, it attracts some of the world's best mountain bikers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The race will see 48 UCI elite men's riders, 19 UCI elite women, and nearly 1 000 committed amateurs facing a slightly different challenge to recent years, with the race entering the kloof from Safran River.","html":"The race will see 48 UCI elite men's riders, 19 UCI elite women, and nearly 1 000 committed amateurs facing a slightly different challenge to recent years, with the race entering the kloof from Safran River."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The first 50km sees a 250m reduction in the total metres of climbing, and a 4km shortening of the best-known route, but Dryland Event Management believes the changes will lead to a faster and more competitive race."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The changes could lead to a more tactical first 40 kilometres to the elite rider tech zone [at Safran River/Water Point 2],\" said Henco Rademeyer of Dryland. \"The final 54 kilometres remain as tough as ever.\"","html":"\"The changes could lead to a more tactical first 40 kilometres to the elite rider tech zone [at Safran River/Water Point 2],\" said Henco Rademeyer of Dryland. \"The final 54 kilometres remain as tough as ever.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alan Hatherly (leading) returns to defend his Attakwas Extreme title on 17 January. Photo: Max Sullivan","html":"Alan Hatherly (leading) returns to defend his Attakwas Extreme title on 17 January. Photo: Max Sullivan"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The climb to the summit of the Attakwaskloof Pass remains the key test of the 120km route from the Chandelier Game Lodge to Pine Creek Resort. Photo: Max Sullivan","html":"The climb to the summit of the Attakwaskloof Pass remains the key test of the 120km route from the Chandelier Game Lodge to Pine Creek Resort. Photo: Max Sullivan"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tristan Nortje is eager to add the Hell of the South title to his haul of major South African event victories. Photo: Max Sullivan","html":"Tristan Nortje is eager to add the Hell of the South title to his haul of major South African event victories. Photo: Max Sullivan"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
